name: Peanut Butter Ice Cream Pie with Hot Fudge Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Whole Peanuts for the top
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients except whole peanuts in a bowl and mix well.
2. Spoon the mixture into the prepared Graham Cracker shell.
3. Top with whole peanuts.
4. Freeze until firm.
5. In a heavy saucepan, combine chocolate chips, evaporated milk, and sugar over low heat.
6. Stir until melted and smooth.
7. Serve warm or cool over the pie.
